title: HEX to RGB Converter
shortDescription: Turn HEX color codes into RGB values for CSS, design specs, and color reviews.
metaDescription: Turn HEX color codes into RGB values for CSS, design specs, and color reviews.
intro: Paste a HEX color like #FF7A18 or #0AF to get its RGB value immediately.
overview:
This converter turns HEX color notation into RGB channel values that you can paste into stylesheets, specs, or component notes. It also normalizes the HEX input, so shorthand and uppercase variants are handled in a consistent way.

Use it when a color must move from a design file, token list, or mockup into a format that uses red, green, and blue channels. The output is straightforward and easy to compare against other color definitions during implementation or review.
howItWorks: Enter a HEX color value or choose one with the picker.
The tool expands shorthand HEX, validates the code, and reads the red, green, and blue channels.
Copy the RGB result for CSS, documentation, or handoff notes.

faq.question: Does the converter accept three-digit HEX values?
faq.answer: Yes. A shorthand value such as #0AF is expanded to its full six-digit form before conversion, so you get the correct RGB channels.

faq.question: What happens if I enter a HEX code without the # sign?
faq.answer: The tool is designed for standard HEX notation. If the format is incomplete or contains invalid characters, it will not produce a reliable RGB result.

faq.question: Why does the RGB result sometimes look different from the HEX string?
faq.answer: HEX and RGB are only different ways to write the same color. The numerical channels are the same color information shown in decimal form.

faq.question: Can I convert transparent colors with this tool?
faq.answer: This converter is for HEX values that represent an opaque color. If alpha transparency is included, the result may require a different format such as RGBA.
